why.exclusiveDesc: Official representation of select international brands within the Yemeni market.
why.authenticDesc: Official assets and certified packaging, with no redesign.

why.partnershipsDesc: Long-term agreements with distributors, pharmacies, and retailers.
why.supportDesc: Continuous technical and commercial support via WhatsApp Business.

home.ecosystemTitle: A global brand ecosystem under one umbrella
home.ecosystemDesc: Trusted international brands managed within a single professional ecosystem that combines quality, governance, and strategic partnerships — while preserving each brand's independent identity.

brands.title: Brand directory
brands.subtitle: Eight global health brands under the Rukn Al-Tawfir umbrella. Logos and product images are shown exclusively from the brand's official assets, with no redesign.

product.pricingNotice: Trade prices and wholesale data are not displayed publicly. For trade inquiries please contact us via the official WhatsApp.

about.titleSuffix: — the exclusive agent for health brands in Yemen
about.subtitle: We are the exclusive agent for a system of global health brands in the Republic of Yemen, operating with institutional governance standards that protect the brand, the customer, and the business partner.

pillars.storyD: Rukn Al-Tawfir Cosmetic for Trade began as a commercial arm specialized in representing global health brands within the Yemeni market, and has grown into the official headquarters of a comprehensive ecosystem of trusted brands.
pillars.missionD: To deliver authentic, certified health products directly from global companies to the Yemeni consumer, with assured storage, distribution, and supply-chain integrity.
pillars.visionD: To be the reference gateway for global health products in Yemen, and the first point of support for distributors, hospitals, pharmacies, and consumers seeking authenticity.
pillars.valuesD: Transparency, authenticity, editorial respect for brands, commitment to governance, and protection of our trade partners' data.
pillars.positionD: Exclusive agent for several international brands, with a distribution network across the Yemeni governorates and a unified business channel via the official WhatsApp Business.

about.ctaTitle: Would you like to open a business channel with us?
about.ctaDesc: All trade inquiries are handled via the official WhatsApp Business.

partners.title: Start your business partnership
partners.subtitle: For distributors, pharmacies, and major retailers wishing to list our ecosystem's brands in their channels, we provide a unified WhatsApp Business channel instead of generic forms — for fast response and confidential partnership terms.
partners.waMsg:
Hello, I'd like to open a business partnership account with Rukn Al-Tawfir.
— Name/Company:
— City:
— Activity type:
— Brands of interest:

tiers.wholesaleD: Regional distributors holding safe stock of the ecosystem's brands, with priority on supply and catalogs.
tiers.pharmaD: Professional accounts sourcing authentic health products directly from the exclusive agent.
tiers.retailD: Shelf-display agreements for consumer brands across major points of sale.
tiers.digitalD: Authorized online stores listing authentic products with official catalogs.

partners.whyTitle: Benefits of partnering with Rukn Al-Tawfir
advantages: Official assets and certified catalogs for every brand
A single business channel via WhatsApp Business
Full protection for the brand and confidential wholesale pricing
Continuous technical and commercial support for distribution partners
partners.channelDesc: There are no public price-request forms. All partnership requests are handled directly through the official channel to guarantee fast response and confidentiality of trade terms.

contact.title: Official communication channels
contact.subtitle: We use WhatsApp Business as the primary channel for all trade and consumer inquiries — to ensure fast response and protect customer data.
contact.formDesc: Fill in the fields below then press send — WhatsApp Business will open with a prepared message including your details. No data is stored on our server.
contact.detailsPlaceholder: Mention the brand or product of interest, and your city

catalogs.title: Official catalogs
catalogs.subtitle: The official catalog library for every brand represented by Rukn Al-Tawfir. Some catalogs require an official request or an approved trade-partner account. No prices or trade data are displayed publicly.
catalogs.emptyDesc: Official catalogs will be uploaded soon by the content team.
catalogs.governanceBody: Restricted and B2B catalogs are not downloaded directly. After a request, our team reviews the requesting party and sends a secure link to the requested catalog. Public catalogs do not include any trade data or wholesale prices.

request.successBody: The Rukn Al-Tawfir team will review your request and contact you within business days. For a quick inquiry, you can reach us on WhatsApp.
request.followWaMsg: Hello, I submitted an access request for the catalog: {title}.
request.error: Couldn't send the request. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.
request.privacy: We will not share your data with any third party. Internal use by the Rukn Al-Tawfir team only.
